description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, tactical design with a predominantly matte black finish and striking blue illuminated elements along the barrel and receiver. The body is angular and robust, with a reinforced frame and a geometric, skeletal foregrip for enhanced handling. The barrel is long and enclosed, with visible blue energy conduits or tubes running parallel to its length, suggesting an advanced or energy-based firing mechanism. The stock is integrated into the rear of the weapon, forming a solid, angular extension without a traditional shoulder rest. The trigger area is protected by a large, squared guard, and the overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and high-strength polymer. This weapon is visually imposing and designed for high-impact urban engagements.
description: A futuristic, angular shotgun with blue illuminated barrel elements and a robust, tactical black frame. Features a skeletal foregrip and integrated stock for advanced urban combat.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, blue illuminated tubes along the barrel, and the angular skeletal foregrip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the blue illuminated elements.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blue illuminated tubes and angular frame, with clear visibility of the integrated stock.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid, angular stock and the squared trigger guard area.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with long, enclosed housing and blue illuminated tubes along the length; no visible ribbing or venting.
attribute_stock_type: no stock (integrated rear extension without a traditional shoulder rest)
attribute_action_mechanism: semi-automatic (suggested by lack of visible pump or break-action mechanism and overall design)
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Large, squared trigger guard with angular edges and ample space, no finger grooves or reinforcement visible.
